description_long: This is a sleek, modern airplane with a dark, metallic exterior and an aggressive, angular design reminiscent of advanced military fighter jets. The wings are sharply swept back and feature pronounced anhedral angles, giving the aircraft a predatory stance. Twin vertical stabilizers rise from the rear, flanking a long, narrow fuselage that tapers to a pointed nose. The engines are integrated into the rear fuselage, with visible exhausts suggesting high-performance jet propulsion. The cockpit is positioned forward and is enclosed by a streamlined canopy, likely designed for a single pilot. The landing gear appears to be retractable, with the main gear housed under the wings and a nose gear under the forward fuselage.
description: A dark, angular, high-performance jet airplane with swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a forward-enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and wide, swept-back wings with visible twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the long fuselage, sharply swept wings, and the rear engine exhausts integrated into the body.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, pronounced anhedral angles, and the symmetrical twin tail fins.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the wing structure and rear engine placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and pronounced anhedral angles; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a conventional horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a streamlined canopy.
